detail.description:
BREAK EVERY WALL. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is a fast, real-time 1v1 PvP strategy brawler where every brick breaks and every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No bot waves. No 20-minute matches. Just online multiplayer PvP battles where one good angle wins the war.

SMASH THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower
